scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,DASHBOARD,WEBSITE -c cyan,yellow,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix dashboard run dev" "npm --prefix website run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:website
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix dashboard run lint
scripts.lint:watch: concurrently -k -n SERVER,DASHBOARD -c cyan,yellow "npm --prefix server run lint:watch" "npm --prefix dashboard run lint:watch"
